tools.name: bundle_urls
tools.description: Bundle multiple URLs into a single short link on UURL.at. Returns the short URL and QR code URLs (.svg and .png). Use this when you want to share multiple reference links as one URL.

tools.name: get_bundle
tools.description: Retrieve the URLs and metadata from a UURL.at short link, including QR code URLs. Use this to inspect what URLs are behind a uurl.at link.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_bundle · Public sink: bundle_urls.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_bundle · Public sink: bundle_urls

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
